nasb.text: When the days of mourning for him were past, Joseph spoke to the household of Pharaoh, saying, “If now I have found favor in your sight, please speak to Pharaoh, saying,

esv.text: And when the days of weeping for him were past, Joseph spoke to the household of Pharaoh, saying, “If now I have found favor in your eyes, please speak in the ears of Pharaoh, saying,

cnv.text: 為他哀哭的日子過了，約瑟就對法老家裡的人說：“我若在你們面前得蒙喜悅，請你們代我稟告法老說：

ccb.text: 哀悼的日子完了，约瑟对法老宫中的人说：“如果你们恩待我，

csbs.text: 为他哀哭的日子过了，约瑟对法老家中的人说：“如果我在你们眼前蒙恩，请你们上报法老说：
